tasks.label: Stop RCE Server
args: Get-Process -Name node | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like '*rce-command-server*' } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host '✅ RCE Server parado'

tasks.label: Check RCE Server Status
args: $token = 'hBu-3gs3meFOp82AnXLzljmIvNaf-7ih'; try { $r = curl -s -X GET 'http://127.0.0.1:5557/status' -H "Authorization: Bearer $token" -ErrorAction Stop; if ($r) { Write-Host '✅ RCE Server RODANDO'; Write-Host $r } else { Write-Host '❌ Servidor não respondeu' } } catch { Write-Host '❌ RCE Server NÃO ESTÁ RODANDO'; Write-Host "Erro: $_" }
